Oracle Events
Search conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Tyler Okonkwo", filter_in_channel: #operations), search_emails (query: "Tyler Okonkwo"), or airtable_search_records (table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Name", value: "Tyler Okonkwo") to find his relocation details
(Philadelphia → Denver, vacate April 18, Denver lease May 1, 13-day storage gap).
Search conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Tyler Okonkwo", filter_in_channel: #operations) or airtable_search_records to discover Chloe shifted move dates from April 11-13 to April 12-14(coordinator scheduling conflict) and that the storage facility quote is still pending from Javier.
Search conversations_search_messages (search_query: "surcharge" or "Canopy invoice", filter_in_channel: #finance) or search_emails (query: "Canopy surcharge" or similar)
to find Canopy surcharge details (Hana posted $9,210 total, including $2,650 pending client approval).
Search search_emails (query: "Patricia Langford" or "surcharge approval"), conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Patricia" or "surcharge approval"), or crm_list_engagements (company_ids: [Canopy Health])to discover Patricia Langford (Canopy HR) has NOT yet approved the pending $2,650 in surcharges — no approval exists in the universe.
Search conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Keiko Tanaka", filter_in_channel: #operations) or airtable_search_records (table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Name", value: "Keiko Tanaka")to find her relocation details (Columbus → Seattle, 400-lb laser cutter, DOT hazmat required, 8-day lease gap).
Search conversations_search_messages (search_query: "DOT" or "placarding", filter_in_channel: #operations), conversations_search_messages (search_query: "DOT" or "compliance", filter_in_channel: #finance),or search_emails (query: "DOT compliance" or "PHMSA") to investigate the DOT compliance audit regarding the laser cutter.
Search conversations_search_messages (search_query: "placarding" or "Blessing", filter_in_channel: #operations) or search_emails (query: "placarding certificate") to discover Blessing Okafor admitted she failed to file the DOT placarding cert — had Swift's verbal confirmation but never obtained the signed document.
Search search_emails (query: "greg.pallone" or "placarding certificate") or conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Greg Pallone" or "Swift cert", filter_in_channel: #operations) to discover Greg Pallone (greg.pallone@swiftrelocations.com) confirmed the signed cert exists in Swift's archive and is sending scanned PDFs within 24 hours.
Search airtable_search_records or crm_search_deals for Keiko Tanaka's relocation record to verify her 8-day lease gap interim storage(Columbus lease ends April 15, Seattle lease starts April 23, storage at Swift Seattle facility).
Search linear_list_issues for existing tickets related to DOT compliance or Keiko Tanaka to discover existing tracking items —including the DOT documentation ticket (in progress) and the subtask for obtaining the Swift cert.
Update Tyler Okonkwo's Airtable relocation record with his 13-day (Apr 18–May 1) storage status
and the pending Canopy surcharge approval status (waiting on Patricia Langford).
Update Keiko Tanaka's Airtable relocation record with her 8-day storage gap status
and corrected DOT documentation status (obtained from Swift/Greg Pallone).
Create Linear tracking ticket(s) for: unresolved Canopy surcharge approval ($2,650 pending total),
Keiko Tanaka's 8-day lease gap storage, and Tyler Okonkwo's unconfirmed vendor rate/extended-stay surcharge.
Post a complete status summary in #operations Slack channel detailing findings for both moves,
including who dropped the DOT cert and confirming it was recovered.
